languages.text: While the Chronomancer is alive, all the Flayed Ones are under the effect of {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chrono Punishment{/g}.

languages.text: Пока хрономант жив, на всех свежевателей действует эффект {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}приговор последовательности{/g}.

languages.text: Solange der Chronomant lebt, werden alle Albträume mit {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chronobestrafung{/g} belegt.

traits.locale_text: Solange der Chronomant lebt, werden alle Albträume mit {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chronobestrafung{/g} belegt.

languages.text: Mientras el Cronomante está vivo, todos los desolladores sufren el efecto de {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Cronocastigo{/g}.

languages.text: Kronobaz hayatta olduğu sürece tüm Yüzülmüşler, {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Krono Cezası{/g} etkisindedir.

languages.text: 编时匠存活时，所有剥皮者受{g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}时空惩戒{/g}影响。
languages.original_text: As long as the Chronomancer is alive, all Flayed Ones are under the effect of {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chrono Punishment{/g}.

languages.text: Tant que le chronomancien est en vie, tous les dépeceurs subissent l'effet de {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chronochâtiment{/g}
languages.original_text: As long as the Chronomancer is alive, all Flayed Ones are under the effect of {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chrono Punishment{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Tant que le chronomancien est en vie, tous les dépeceurs subissent l'effet de {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chronochâtiment{/g}

languages.text: 時間操作者は生きている限り、すべての剥ぎ取られた者は{g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}時間罰{/g}の影響下にある。
languages.original_text: As long as the Chronomancer is alive, all Flayed Ones are under the effect of {g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}Chrono Punishment{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 時間操作者は生きている限り、すべての剥ぎ取られた者は{g|f:9bf3eae4e5f64aeca996df0742a478cd}時間罰{/g}の影響下にある。
